title: Verify generic evidence registration and linkage
preconditions: A fresh Ledger with active and inactive transactions plus valid, duplicate, conflicting, cross-transaction, and forbidden-payload evidence requests.
steps: Exercise every acceptance criterion of FR-LEDGER-EVIDENCE-REGISTRATION through the public CLI, including same-request replay and logical-evidence replay under another request identity.
expected: One privacy-safe Evidence Record and active link exist per logical effect; multiple evidence records may support one transaction; conflicts and forbidden payloads fail without mutation; evidence alone does not change reconciliation state.
